quotes.text: Every time I see someone come out with an answer in a day, I know they don't understand the problem yet.
quotes.author: Rich Hickey

quotes.text: Weeks of coding can save you hours of planning.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
quotes.author: John Johnson

quotes.text: Productivity is never an accident. It is always the result of commitment to excellence, intelligent planning, and focused effort.
quotes.author: Paul J. Meyer

quotes.text: The key is not to prioritize what's on your schedule, but to schedule your priorities.
quotes.author: Stephen Covey

quotes.text: The best time to think about data migration is during schema design. Not after you've got 10TB of data.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to think about internationalization is when you're building your first date picker. Not after you've hardcoded American dates everywhere.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your future self is a stranger you're building a life for. Be kind to them.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to quit your job is when you have 6 months of runway. Not when you're fed up. Not when you're rich.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to think about revenue is on day one. Not 'someday.' Not 'after we launch.' Day one.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to build a financial model is before you need one. The second best time is when you're panicking.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to handle failure is to expect it. Plan for it. Learn from it. Move on.
quotes.author: based
